notes: Update to the previous report: almost 50 hrs played, no issue offline / online. After Steam update of Jan 19th 2019, also the file BloodBowl2_DX_32.exe must be linked to BloodBowl2_GL_32.exe, otherwise the game does not start any more for some reason.
title: Blood Bowl 2

notes: As others report, had to create a symlink in the game directory ( ln -s BloodBowl2_GL_32.exe BloodBowl2.exe ).  Also after Alt+Tabbing out and back in, another single Alt press is required to enable mouse clicks.
title: Blood Bowl 2

notes:
The game itself seems to run perfectly under linux, but in less than a week it wrote the line "Viewport hasn't been setted" THREE BILLION times to my ~/.xsession-errors file, filling my $HOME partition twice.
If you remember to remove that log file now and then (and reboot so that there are no processes still writing to it) then the game works fine.
title: Blood Bowl 2

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 with Max-Q Design
notes: After a rename of BloodBowl2.exe (with .old) and a ln -s BloodBowl2_GL_32.exe BloodBowl2.exe. It work perfectly in ultra with 50 ~ 60FPS during game!
title: Blood Bowl 2

notes: The only thing is to press Alt in-game after Alt-Tabbing to get input(key & mouse) focus back.
title: Blood Bowl 2

notes: Runs almost perfect with only the smallest caveat... As others have said, tap Alt to regain input after alt-tabbing out of the game.
title: Blood Bowl 2
